svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="互动闭环" id="e2e-interaction"> <mxGraphModel dx="-544" dy="-170" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1000" pageHeight="640" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="t1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontColor=#2563eb;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="发起方 (用户2 · t2)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="200" x="80" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontColor=#2563eb;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="业务接口" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="160" x="420" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="t3" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontColor=#2563eb;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="感知方 (用户1 · t1)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="200" x="760" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lt1" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;html=1;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="160" y="60" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="160" y="540" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lt2" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;html=1;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="500" y="60" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="500" y="540" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="lt3" edge="1" parent="1" style="endArrow=none;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;html=1;" value=""> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="840" y="60" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="840" y="540" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m1" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;endArrow=classic;" value="POST /notifications/send (INTERACT_LIKE)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="160" y="100" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="500" y="100" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m2" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;endArrow=classic;dashed=1;" value="200 { status: SUCCESS }"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="500" y="140" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="160" y="140" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note1" parent="1" style="text;html=1;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=11;" value="⚠ 只看 200 证明不了「真落库」" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="280" x="540" y="135" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m3" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;endArrow=classic;" value="POST send (INTERACT_COMMENT)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="160" y="200" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="500" y="200" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m4" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;endArrow=classic;" value="POST send ×3 (聚合测试)"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="160" y="250" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="500" y="250" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m5" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontSize=11;endArrow=classic;strokeWidth=2;" value="GET notifications/in-app"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="840" y="340" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="500" y="340" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="m6" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;fontSize=11;endArrow=classic;dashed=1;" value="200 { list: [...], total: N }"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="500" y="380" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="840" y="380" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="assert" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;align=center;fontStyle=1;" value="数据层断言：✅ total>0 ✅ 含 INTERACTION ✅ 含@ ✅ 聚合数正确" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="44" width="400" x="540" y="430" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cap" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;" value="关键：发起方用 t2，感知方用 t1 — 这种「错位」正是多角色测试的精髓" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="22" width="780" x="120" y="500" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
